mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TMP.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY product_name) AS RN FROM ( SELECT product.name AS PRODUCT_NAME, product.name AS MATERIAL_NUMBER, product.VALUE AS MATERIAL_NAME, product.VIRTUALNAME AS STYLE_NUMBER, product.M_DIM1_ID AS BRAND_ID, brand.ATTRIBNAME AS BRAND_NAME, product.colorsalias AS COLOR, product.PRICELIST AS PRICE, 'GB 18401-2010' AS EXECUTION_STANDARD, '6901234567892' AS EAN13, '中国' AS ORIGIN, 'B.C.SPORTS' AS MANUFACTURER, '福建省厦门市思明区体育路88号' AS MANUFACTURER_ADDRESS, '0592-8888888' AS CONTACT_PHONE, '100%聚酯纤维' AS MATERIAL_COMPOSITION, product.M_SIZEGROUP_ID AS SIZEGROUP_ID, product.SIZES AS SIZES FROM M_PRODUCT product LEFT JOIN M_DIM brand ON product.M_DIM1_ID = brand.ID
) TMP ) WHERE RN > #{offset} AND RN <= #{offset} + #{pageSize}

SELECT product.name AS MATERIAL_NUMBER, product.VALUE AS MATERIAL_NAME, product.VIRTUALNAME AS STYLE_NUMBER, product.M_DIM1_ID AS BRAND_ID, brand.ATTRIBNAME AS BRAND_NAME, product.colorsalias AS COLOR, product.PRICELIST AS PRICE, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(100)) AS EXECUTION_STANDARD, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(20)) AS EAN13, product.M_SIZEGROUP_ID AS SIZEGROUP_ID, product.SIZES AS SIZES FROM M_PRODUCT product LEFT JOIN M_DIM brand ON product.M_DIM1_ID = brand.ID WHERE product.name = #{ean13}
SELECT ID, ATTRIBNAME FROM M_DIM WHERE M_DIMDEF_ID = 1 and DIMFLAG = 'DIM1' ORDER BY ATTRIBCODE ASC
